words.clue: First Mate, Estate, Throne Room, Outpost, Pickaxe, Overlord, Legionary, Ironmonger, Shanty Town
words.explanation:
First letter of each word: METROPOLIS
Metropolis is a kind of settlement.

words.clue: Person surprised by a bird starting in Madagascar, ending in Oman
words.explanation:
MAD(agascar) + (O)MAN.
Madman's Dombot text is "A man is surprised by a bird."

words.clue: Sorceress imprisons goblin-like creature
words.explanation:
s(ORC)eress
An orc is a goblin-like creature

words.clue: Variants? Go crazy future Berserkers
words.explanation:
"variants go" anag.
Navigator is a removed card depicting Dale Yu, who was later depicted on Berserker.

words.clue: Map description, map result (no good)
words.explanation:
GOLD (result of Treasure Map) - G(ood)
Old is the description of Old Map

words.clue: An Event sounds like Attacks!
words.explanation:
"Attacks" homophone
A TAX (Tax is an Event that can have a negative effect on your opponent, like an attack)

words.clue: End of Magpie (cantrip with no reaction)
words.explanation:
TRAIL (cantrip) - R(eaction)
Tail is the body part at the end of a Magpie

words.clue: Liquid comes out of extra round Gladiator bottom
words.explanation:
FLEET (extra round) - L(iquid)
Feet are the the bottom of a person, and Gladiator's feet are prominent in the art for Fortune (at the bottom of its pile)

words.clue: Programming language recursively put an Action card onto your deck
words.explanation: Double definition. Scheme is a programming language. To "Scheme" a card is to put it onto your deck with Scheme.

words.clue: Workers Village Loot
words.explanation:
Double definition.
Staff = workers
Village Loot (play an action card)

words.clue: Elevated cost reduction? No way
words.explanation:
HIGHWAY - WAY
High = elevated

words.clue: AI image data storage
words.explanation: Double definition. Cache is the card image of the Temple Gate Hard AI's avatar image. In computing a cache stores data to be retrieved quickly.

words.clue: In Samoa, there's old defense
words.explanation:
Sa(MOA T)here's
Earliest released card to directly defend against attacks.

words.clue: Goddamn Blue Dog
words.explanation:
GD = Goddamn abbr.
Guard Dog (reaction card depicting a dog)

words.clue: Game discards no counter, gains California island
words.explanation:
DOMINION - ON (no rev.) + CA(lifornia)
Caribbean island nation.

words.clue: Big hand of Rabble sifts sift
words.explanation:
SIFT anag.
One of the largest hands visible in Rabble's art is held in a fist.

words.clue: Travel a way, with no dairy
words.explanation:
BUTTERFLY (a way) - BUTTER (dairy)
To fly can mean to travel

words.clue: Title Silver sans short leave
words.explanation:
SILVER - LVE (short form of leave)
Sir is a title

words.clue: Siren, Island, Supplies, Grotto, Artist
words.explanation:
Siren (homophone clue) mat (Supplies used for Island) = MATT
Matt Jordan is the artist behind Grotto

words.clue: Turns in his Loot card (from Plunder)
words.explanation:
hi(S LOOT) backwards.
Tools is a card from Plunder

words.clue: Cornucopia event
words.explanation: Double definition. Cornucopia means Horn of Plenty, which is shortened to HOP. A hop is a kind of party, a kind of event.

words.clue: Title boy, who becomes a Dame following estrogen
words.explanation:
Boy who becomes a Dame = SQUIRE following E (estrogen)
Esquire is a title used by lawyers

words.clue: Pre-Roman pronoun boxed in. Thank you Second Edition pronoun
words.explanation:
HE (pre-Empires pronoun) inside TY (thank you)
All instance of He replaced by They in 2016 errata, coinciding with Empires and the first Second Editions.

words.clue: Hunter's prize on mutinous ship
words.explanation: Double definition. Referring to Bounty Hunter and to the Mutiny on the Bounty.

words.clue: Lief plundered, dashing after a clash with no plan, gaining Green landmark
words.explanation:
BATTLE (clash with no plan) + FIEL (Lief anag.) + D (dashing).
Battlefield is the Landmark that rewards gaining green (Victory cards).

words.clue: Gold gainer's unction, rotating Scavenger first!
words.explanation:
AU (gold) G(ainer's) U(nction) R(otating) S(cavenger). ! means whole clue is both definition and cryptic.
Gold gainer's unction (Acolyte gains Gold, depicts anointing oil) rotating Scavenger first (Herb Gatherer rotates, puts deck in discard, and is on top)

words.clue: Swashbucklers slash removed card
words.explanation:
"Swashbucklers Slash" = "Pirate Ship", Slash fiction = shipping fiction.
Pirate Ship was removed.

words.clue: Broken arrow in Archer's weapon is cause of a 4 card hand
words.explanation:
(a)RRO(w) in BOW
Borrow gives -Card token in Buy phase, and so can be a cause of a 4 card hand.

words.clue: First issue of Ironworks-Trader!
words.explanation:
First letters of I(ronworks) T(rader)
First printings of Ironworks and Trader had an issue where the "it" on Ironworks was ambiguous, leading to the Blue Dog rule.

words.clue: Final Aristocrats? TFB fodder
words.explanation:
last four letters of Aristoc(RATS)
Rats is useful as trash-for-benefit fodder.

words.clue: Caribbean island set aside way in Spain
words.explanation:
set aside way = TURTLE, in Spain (Spanish) TORTUGA
Tortuga is an island in Haiti

words.clue: True err at masq: rotated gainer
words.explanation:
"true err at masq" anag.
Quartermaster is a gainer.

words.clue: Choosy witch without her token toy
words.explanation:
KITSUNE (choosy witch) - SUN (sun tokens used by Kitsune)
Kite is a toy.

words.clue: Former orange trasher
words.explanation:
EX + O(range)
Exorcist is a trasher

words.clue: Duke University Bishop/Pawn game missing free Spy
words.explanation:
D(uke) U(niversity) + CHESS (game with Bishops and Pawns)
Duchess is a removed (missing) card that came free with a Duchy and had a Spy effect.

words.clue: Overly mini pea baffled Chinese royal? BS
words.explanation:
"overly mini pea" anag.
Imperial Envoy originally called Chinese Envoy. +5 cards and use of debt similar to Royal Blacksmith (BS).

words.clue: Village and sifting? Sounds like the middle of one's Dominion game
words.explanation:
Homophone of (one's Dom)IN(ion game)
Inn is a village and sifting.

words.clue: Soon: Headless black cards
words.explanation:
NIGHT (black cards) - T (headless)
Nigh = soon

words.clue: Cantrip puts heel in Wishing Well, right?
words.explanation:
HEEL in WW (Wishing Well) + RIGHT
Wheelwright is a cantrip.

words.clue: Stampeding group; tragic figure cut short, dead
words.explanation:
(Tragic) HER(o) + D(ead)
A group of Horses (Stampede) is a Herd

words.clue: Trash Harbinger gift surrounds central characters from new Harem
words.explanation:
f(AR)m in MOON (Moon's Gift has the effect of Harbinger).
To Maroon a card is to trash it.

words.clue: Uplifted gifting sifter shifted by seams
words.explanation:
BY SEAMS anag.
Embassy sifts, gives out silvers, and was replaced (uplifted)

words.clue: Animated trash Golem beginning to deliver promotional description
words.explanation:
WALL-E (animated trash Golem [robot]) + D (beginning to Deliver)
Adjective describing promo Walled Village.

words.clue: Open a $5 with an event, a Catholic event
words.explanation:
A + MASS (Catholic church service).
To Amass a card is to gain it with Amass, which can gain $5 cards and is most useful in the opening.

words.clue: Villain (Werewolf-type) is after overpaid trashy guilds-man
words.explanation:
DOOM (Werewolf type) after DOCTOR (trashing card with overpay from Guilds that depicts a man)
Doctor Doom is a Marvel Villain.

words.clue: Bid coin tokens without Cornucopia or Seaside
words.explanation:
COFFERS (Coin Tokens) - C - S
A bid is a kind of offer

words.clue: CornGuilds $4 Remakes thin cow guy
words.explanation:
"thin cow guy" anag.
Young Witch is a $4 from Cornucopia & Guilds

words.clue: He or it stands disorganized after voyage victory
words.explanation:
"He or it stands" anag.
Victory card in Odysseys pile, underneath Voyage.

words.clue: Development used tavern!
words.explanation:
USED TAVERN anag.
Expansion that used the Tavern mat.

words.clue: Occultist man has transformed
words.explanation:
MAN HAS anag.
A Shaman is a kind of occultist

words.clue: Brief Ferryman expansion, Miller style
words.explanation:
Ferryman comes from the expansion Cornucopia and Guilds (briefly, CG)
Kurt Miller's art is done in Computer Graphics

words.clue: Course of life oddly favored dwelling
words.explanation:
Odd letters of CAVE (Dwellers)
Course of life = curriculum vitae = CV

words.clue: Serviceman attack with no bug
words.explanation:
GIANT (attack card) - ANT (bug)
G.I. = serviceman

words.clue: Loot sibling put back
words.explanation:
BRO reversed
Orb is a Loot

words.clue: Float phase with nothing in it
words.explanation:
BUY (phase) + O (nothing) in it
A buoy is a kind of float in the water.

words.clue: Wholly Roman 4 returns!
words.explanation:
ALL (wholly) + IV (4 in Roman numerals) backwards (returns)
Villa is a $4 Empires card (Roman) that returns you to your Action phase.

words.clue: Literature ending in sorrow: A Fool's Fate
words.explanation:
LIT(erature) + sorro(W)
Lost in the Woods is the state associated with Fool.

words.clue: Messed-up sprite trasher
words.explanation:
SPRITE anag.
Priest is a trasher.

words.clue: Stableman room completes far end of building
words.explanation:
buildin(G) + ROOM
Groom is another word for a stableman

words.clue: Empires wear Heirloom in pieces
words.explanation:
GOAT anag.
Garment depicted in various Empires cards

words.clue: VP ousts leader following frontal assault event
words.explanation:
A(ssault) + JD VANCE (Vice President) - J (first letter)
Advance is an event.

words.clue: In a top reaction: return southeast direction
words.explanation:
ES (SE or Southeast rev.) in WT (Watchtower is a reaction that can put cards on top)
West is a direction

words.clue: Over flow: exactly one beast
words.explanation:
FLOW backwards
Wolf (beast from landmark punishing "exactly one")

words.clue: Use XL Rope to make my first Pirate
words.explanation:
EXPLORER made with letters in XL ROPE (word bank)
Explorer is the 1E predecessor to Pirate

words.clue: Hybrid colony endangered following wizard's fortress
words.explanation:
EN (endangered) following LICH (in Wizards pile, like Fortress cannot enter the trash)
Lichen is a hybrid colony of fungus and algae or cyanobacteria.

words.clue: Own cantrip save? Not new
words.explanation:
HAVEN (cantrip with effect like event Save) - N(ew)
Own = have

words.clue: Way to set aside Loot, finally
words.explanation:
puzzle b(OX) is the Loot that allows you to set cards aside, final letters
Ox is a Way

words.clue: Looting Plunder's opening gives Plunder opening village
words.explanation:
L(ooting) P(lunder's) opening (first letters)
Landing Party is a village from Plunder that it can be reasonable to open with.

words.clue: Brief draw can be found in Reckless Tactician
words.explanation:
TACTICIAN backwards contains (naicit)CAT
Cat(acombs) is a draw card, short form.

words.clue: Sunshine state agriculture thing taken following trash
words.explanation:
FL(orida) + AG(rigulture)
Card-shaped-thing taken after trashing Flag Bearer

words.clue: Returning to Somalia at odds with charity
words.explanation:
Odd letters of Somalia all reversed.
Alms is a form of charrity.

words.clue: As he epitomizes stores, search for a way
words.explanation:
aS HE EPitomizes
Sheep is a Way with the +$2 effect of Search

words.clue: Jealousy? Envoy lacks nothing
words.explanation:
ENVOY - O (nothing)
Jealousy = Envy

words.clue: Omen: Shelter in port
words.explanation:
OE (Shelter Overgrown Estate) in PT
Poet is an Omen

words.clue: Renaissance two have no artifacts, I hear
words.explanation:
LACK (have no) + KEYS (Artifacts). Together a homophone (I hear) of LACKEYS.
$2 card from Renaissance, which depicts two people.

words.clue: Nomads die on bus catastrophically
words.explanation:
DIE ON BUS anag.
Bedouins are Arab nomads

words.clue: Shriek. Platinum treasure storage
words.explanation:
CRY (shriek) + PT (Platinum)
Crypt is a card that sets aside Treasures.
